name: engineering-leadership-agent-toolkit
description: Engineering Leadership Agent Toolkit: skills and plugins for engineering team leads, derived from Camille Fournier's The Manager's Path and James Stanier's Become an Effective Software Engineering Manager.

plugins.name: engineering-leadership
plugins.description: Skills for one-on-ones, feedback and reviews, project breakdown, team health, hard conversations, hiring, and career growth.

plugins.name: effective-manager
plugins.description: Tactical, day-to-day engineering-management skills: first-week snapshot, manager toolkit, 1-1s, performance reviews, hiring, motivation, stress and pressure, information and politics, self-care, team housekeeping, and the career vision exercise.
